element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Aggressive damage output for heavily armored enemies
Five distinct enemy factions with escalating threat patterns
Final retrieval mission combining all previous mechanics

typical_relief_triggers: Mode transformation windows between combat phases
Safe traversal zones between enemy formations
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Slow to moderate pace with high challenge spikes; reviewers noted deliberate pacing allowing strategic mode-switching rather than reflexive action

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory walker mode teaches basic mechanics and traversal in World 1
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive mode unlocking (Sonic Jet, Land Burner) expands tactical options; Worlds 2-3 increase enemy density and aggression
difficulty_curve.late_game: Hard Shell mode introduction (World 4) shifts to survival focus; World 5 final confrontation demands mastery of all four forms
notable_spikes: Hard Shell mode introduction requiring defensive playstyle adjustment
Boss encounters at end of each world
Final Aki-Do core retrieval mission combining all mechanics under maximum pressure

notable_level_patterns.description: Each world introduces or emphasizes a distinct mech transformation mode, with level design and enemy patterns tailored to showcase that form's strengths
The five worlds correspond to five distinct Aki-Do Forces factions, each with unique enemy types and environmental hazards
Sections requiring specific mech form commitment, creating vulnerability windows that demand strategic mode-switching
